title: Culiacán, Sinaloa — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Culiacán, Sinaloa: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Culiacán is a city in Sinaloa with a population of 1,021,897. Capital of Sinaloa with a strong agricultural economy, vibrant culture, and the famous Las Riberas park.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
